errors.ruleTitle: Context Filter: context.entityId should be configured
errors.message: Entity ID to fetch when entityIdSource is manual (or as a fallback when missing).
errors.recommendation: Set config.context.entityId in Context Filter configuration.

errors.ruleTitle: Trigger: Scheduled Run: trigger.event uses documented values
errors.message: What event fires this Trigger node. Use manual for UI-driven runs; scheduled_run for server/cron runs. Allowed values inferred from docs: server, cron, manual.
errors.recommendation: Set config.trigger.event to one of: server, cron, manual.
